title: Crafty Hands
description: Craft gloves and place them in dispensers to simulate left and right clicks.
body:
This mod adds Right and Left Glove items, which when placed in a Dispenser and given a Redstone signal can be used to simulate right and left clicks on the block or entity its facing.

Should work with most mods, but please report any unusual behavior via the issues page.
